description: The 'Ndrina Pesce is one of the most powerful 'ndrine of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Rosarno, Calabria. It has an army of affiliates organized in 30 'locali' and numerous 'ndrine, with interests extending from Reggio Calabria to Milan. The clan is involved in all trafficking in the Gioia Tauro area, including drugs, extortion, and control of agricultural markets. It has alliances with other major 'ndrine such as Piromalli, Mancuso, and Molè, and is active internationally with connections in Austria, Greece, Lebanon, Germany, and France.

country_links.evidence_quote: L'organizzazione aveva basi in Brasile , Argentina , Repubblica Dominicana , Colombia , Spagna e Montenegro .
country_links.context: The organization had bases in Argentina for international drug trafficking.
